members.name: Tre'Von Barber
bio: 5 yrs at RTB · Also leads Affiliate

goals.title: Hit 50K Instagram followers by EOQ
goals.body: Currently at 32K. Reels-first content strategy driving most growth.

goals.title: Avg engagement rate >5% on Reels
goals.body: Tracking 4.8% — close. Testing more BTS / range-day content.

goals.title: Launch TikTok presence
goals.body: Account claimed, content calendar in progress. Need legal sign-off on first 3 posts.

stakeholders.title: Legal Review
stakeholders.body: Required for any post making product or self-defense legal claims.

stakeholders.title: Creative
stakeholders.body: Delivers static + video assets for paid + organic.

notes.title: Risk: IG algorithm shift
notes.body: Reach down ~12% past 2 weeks. Pivoting to vertical-first content.

notes.title: Note: Vertical-first content
notes.body: All shoots from Q2 onward will produce 9:16 native, 1:1 secondary.

members.name: Katherine Rupp
bio: 3 yrs at RTB · Owns email + lifecycle

goals.title: Open rate >28% Q2
goals.body: Currently 28%. List hygiene + subject-line testing driving lift.

goals.title: Reduce unsubscribes by 15%
goals.body: Re-segmenting by purchase recency. Win-back v2 in QA.

goals.title: List growth +5K Q2
goals.body: On pace. SEO drives ~70% of new opt-ins; social pop-ups testing.

stakeholders.title: VP Marketing
stakeholders.body: Final sign-off on quarterly themes + win-back strategy.

stakeholders.title: Legal
stakeholders.body: CAN-SPAM compliance review on every transactional flow.

notes.title: Risk: deliverability dipping in Outlook
notes.body: IP reputation issue flagged by Postmark — investigating.

notes.title: Note: re-segmenting by purchase recency
notes.body: Moving to 30/60/90/180-day buckets for win-back targeting.

members.name: Tre'Von Barber
bio: This week: tier rollout deck for Rich

goals.title: 18 active partners by EOQ
goals.body: At 14 active. 5 in onboarding pipeline; 3 likely to close.

goals.title: Avg partner ROI >3.5x
goals.body: Tracking 3.1x. Tier system should lift top-quartile.

stakeholders.title: Sales
stakeholders.body: Routes warm partner intros + closes B2B deals.

notes.title: Risk: two top partners renegotiating
notes.body: Partner A and Partner C asking for revised splits. Could impact Q2 revenue ~$8K.

notes.title: Note: tier system for partner perks
notes.body: Bronze/Silver/Gold based on monthly revenue. Rolling out April.
